GIFI
Mon compte
LEADER FRANÇAIS DU SMART DISCOUNT
42 ans d’idées de Génie !
ADN & Culture de GiFi
﻿
GiFi est spécialiste de l'équipement de la maison et des produits pour toute la famille, au bon prix, depuis 1981 !
Le smart discount se démarque du hard discount par la qualité des produits aux bons prix, dans un cadre agréable, pour le plaisir des clients.
Notre mission
: le plaisir de faire plaisir en facilitant le quotidien des familles et en les surprenant grâce à des produits malins et tendance au meilleur rapport qualité-prix.
Notre ambition
: partager nos idées de génie pour que tous nos clients puissent en profiter.
Une stratégie de renouvellement constant :
« Depuis 1981, nous n’avons cessé de nous renouveler tout en préservant nos fondamentaux de commerçant. Nos magasins sont le rendez-vous incontournable des achats malins pour notre clientèle familiale, multigénérationnelle, grâce à la richesse de notre offre à bon prix et à nos Talents !
Nos équipes trouvent chaque jour de nouveaux produits en France, en Europe et dans le monde, à la fois attractifs et utiles, des idées différentes et innovantes.
Nous avons engagé notre enseigne en faveur du pouvoir d’achat avec une baisse des prix sur la majorité de nos produits. Grâce à GiFi, nos clients pourront se faire plaisir et faire plaisir à leurs proches avec des produits tendance à petits prix.
Notre culture d’entreprise familiale perpétue et assume la méritocratie de nos équipes qui font la différence au quotidien ! »
﻿
Philippe Ginestet
1. Discounter
Soldeur pionnier à sa création en 1981, GiFi est devenue l’enseigne de référence des prix attractifs toute l’année. Grâce à une Centrale d’achat intégrée, nous n’avons pas d’intermédiaires. Cette liberté se retrouve directement sur nos prix pour le plus grand plaisir de nos clients.
2.
Enseigne intergénérationnelle
Nous nous adressons à toutes les générations et à toutes les catégories sociales confondues. Chaque membre d’une famille peut trouver chez GiFi l’article qui lui correspond pour la vie de tous les jours, durant toutes les périodes de l’année (Halloween, Noël, vacances, rentrée...) et aux moments phares de sa vie (anniversaire, mariage…). Gifi fait pleinement partie de la vie de ses clients.
3. Facilitateur & novateur
GiFi propose un large choix de vraies idées de génie à travers des produits malins, utiles et pratiques, afin de simplifier le quotidien de tous. Nos équipes de sourcing Europe et Asie sont mobilisées toute l’année pour trouver des articles répondant à la marque de fabrique de GiFi.
4. Distributeur d’achat-plaisir
Se faire plaisir à bon prix aurait pu être aussi la signature de GiFi. L’offre est diversifiée et renouvelée sans cesse, en proposant tout ce qu’il faut pour la maison, la décoration, les cadeaux et les loisirs. Nous sommes au plus proche des attentes de nos clients, afin que toute la famille trouve son bonheur à petits prix. Ainsi, les bons prix côtoient la qualité dans un cadre agréable.
Une culture d'entreprise forte
GiFi est devenu l’un des employeurs de référence en France grâce à une culture fondée sur la confiance, l’audace, le respect et la volonté assumée de permettre à tous de réussir.
« Chez nous, notre culture est portée par la force d’aimer qui, depuis 42 ans, a façonné notre Groupe. Une culture n’a de sens que lorsqu’elle se vit et fédère les équipes ; la force d’une culture intemporelle est une force unique.
Elle se résume en un mot : FIERTE, moteur de notre performance, individuelle et collective.
Fierté de nos racines ; Fierté d’être une entreprise française à rayonnement international ; Fierté de nos équipes habitées par la même envie de faire plaisir.
« Les idées de génie » font battre le cœur de nos clients, grâce à la somme de tous les Talents de GiFi, qui rendent notre entreprise vraiment unique et qui, depuis sa création, n’a jamais cessé d’évoluer, tout en restant elle-même. »
﻿Brigitte Ginestet, Directrice de la Culture
Une entreprise familiale française et dynamique
Une histoire de passion
GiFi, c’est une incroyable histoire familiale, débutée en 1981 par Philippe Ginestet. Elle ne cesse de s’écrire depuis lors. Lorsque le 1er point de vente voit le jour, l’enseigne s’affiche comme un véritable soldeur.
Pourquoi le nom de marque « GiFi » ? C’est la 1ère syllabe du nom et du prénom du Fondateur. La simplicité, toujours. Cela est plus que jamais au cœur de l’ADN de GiFi.
De solderie, le concept évolue vers celui de premier prix pour compter 100 magasins en 1998. En 2002, l’enseigne commence son expansion à l’international et atteint 200 magasins l’année suivante. En 2007, GiFi crée une centrale d’achats en Asie et la filiale GiFi Asia voit ainsi le jour pour s’approvisionner sans intermédiaire. L’aventure continue et en 2013, le seuil des 400 magasins est dépassé. GiFi franchit le cap des 500 points de vente en 2019.
Du soldeur aux « idées de Génie », le concept GiFi connaît un succès non démenti depuis sa création.
Aujourd’hui, l’enseigne compte plus de 600 magasins GiFi et des équipes engagées qui ont une vraie passion pour le commerce et les clients.
Marque-enseigne leader sur le marché français
GiFi consolide son leadership de marque-enseigne et poursuit son développement, tout en restant un employeur national de premier plan et un employeur local engagé. La créativité et la diversité de l’offre GiFi permettent de répondre aux attentes de toutes les générations. Partout où GiFi s’implante, sa priorité est de constituer des équipes de commerçants locaux qui connaissent leur clientèle.
Marque française à rayonnement international
Son rayonnement à l’international est également au cœur des choix stratégiques de l’enseigne.
Avec sa filiale en Belgique, le Groupe GiFi compte aujourd’hui plus de 700 magasins avec les points de vente sous enseigne TRAFIC, dont la signature de marque est « Achetez malin ».
Le Groupe GiFi est présent dans 17 pays. L’entreprise s’adapte aux spécificités nationales, tout en maintenant son ADN.
Un groupe familial solide
L’enseigne fait partie, depuis 1993, de la Holding GPG (Groupe Philippe Ginestet). Le Groupe compte, au travers de ses filiales et participations, un réseau de distribution de plus de 1 000 magasins et totalise plus de 10 000 collaborateurs.
GPG connaît une croissance ininterrompue depuis sa création et s’articule autour de trois pôles d’activités complémentaires : la distribution (dont fait partie GiFi, Besson et Grain de Malice), l’immobilier et la diversification.
La notoriété de sa filiale de distribution GiFi et l’expertise de son pôle immobilier sur l’ensemble du territoire français, en tant que promoteur, investisseur et gestionnaire, conduisent GPG à se diversifier au travers de participations dans des secteurs variés, matures ou innovants et avec une belle dynamique de croissance.

Nuestra visión
Pasión, audacia y confianza son nuestras palabras clave
Índice
Visión
En Prodware, cuando decimos que nuestra misión es ayudar a las empresas a proyectarse en el futuro ¡lo decimos en serio!
La transformación digital es un enorme catalizador del cambio para las empresas
, que necesitan replantear y reinventar sus modelos de negocio poniendo el foco en sus sectores de actividad, tecnología y operaciones. El modelo de gestión de Prodware está preparado para acompañar a nuestros clientes en su camino hacia la digitalización
¡Construyamos tu futuro juntos!
¿Quiénes somos?
Somos impulsores apasionados del modelo customer-centric. Ayudamos a nuestros clientes a lograr altos niveles de rendimiento mediante una propuesta de valor end-to-end que abarca desde la consultoría de negocio hasta los servicios gestionados aprovechando las avanzadas tecnologías empresariales de Microsoft.
¿Qué hacemos?
Nuestra propuesta de valor única, integrada con un componente de innovación, ofrece una nueva y poderosa dinámica aportando valor en el mercado de la transformación digital, necesitado de dirección y rumbo. Como empresa experimentada juntamos valor añadido, tecnología, innovación y visión empresarial, generando el impulso necesario para abordar los proyectos más audaces.
Nuestros valores
Pasión
La pasión forma parte de nuestro día a día. Tenemos éxito en lo que hacemos por cómo lo hacemos, porque nuestros equipos los forman personas que quieren construir un futuro con nosotros.
Audacia
Nos motiva afrontar nuevos retos, generando un impulso sin precedentes para desarrollar proyectos innovadores. Eso nos hace marcar la diferencia con cada uno de nuestros clientes.
Confianza
Prodware va de la mano con el compromiso. Hemos recorrido un largo camino en los últimos 30 años gracias a la pasión de nuestros empleados, la confianza de nuestros clientes y nuestra capacidad de innovación.
La innovación es el corazón de nuestra identidad
Nos esforzamos por capitalizar y convertir los avances tecnológicos en un catalizador de competencias y de experiencia para servir a nuestros clientes
En qué creemos
Creemos en
crear compañías modernas
y en reinventar la forma en que hacen negocios
Creemos en
simplificar y optimizar tus proyectos y procesos
utilizando tecnologías innovadoras
Creemos en nuestra búsqueda constante de la
mejora continua del rendimiento
Creemos en ofrecer a las personas con talento y motivadas, la
oportunidad de crecer
Creemos en
trabajar juntos y construir el mundo del futuro
Microsoft y nosotros
Mantenemos una colaboración estratégica con Microsoft desde hace muchos años. Desarrollamos nuestras soluciones sectoriales innovadoras utilizando su tecnología porque creemos que disponen de la tecnología más avanzada del mercado hoy en día.
Por segundo año consecutivo, hemos ganado la pertenencia al Inner Circle for Business Applications de Microsoft 2019/2020. Los miembros de este selecto club son reconocidos por su alto estándar de excelencia entregando soluciones innovadoras y de alto valor, ayudando a sus clientes a obtener mayores cotas de éxito. Este reconocimiento consolida a Prodware entre los partners estratégicos de Microsoft dentro de su ecosistema.

Design
Desde la investigación hasta la conceptualización. De la idea a la ejecución impecable. Creamos productos y servicios digitales que generan valor para el negocio, son fáciles de usar, accesibles y eficaces. Experiencias que convierten, optimizan costes y, sobre todo, enamoran a tus clientes y usuarios.
Design Services
Data
Somos un equipo apasionado de especialistas en todas las áreas tecnológicas (Arquitectura, Front, Back, Mobile, DXP, Comercio). Sin ataduras a una sola tecnología, diseñamos soluciones que se ajustan a la perfección a tus necesidades, ayudándote a superar todos los retos de tu negocio.
Servicios de Data
Technology
Somos un equipo apasionado de especialistas en todas las áreas tecnológicas (Arquitectura, Front, Back, Mobile, DXP, Comercio). Sin ataduras a una sola tecnología, diseñamos soluciones que se ajustan a la perfección a tus necesidades, ayudándote a superar todos los retos de tu negocio.
Servicios de Tecnología
Digital Sales
Contamos con un equipo especializado en impulsar las ventas online a través de tecnología, diseño y estrategia. Creamos soluciones a medida para hacer crecer tus canales digitales y potenciar tu performance de negocio.
Sevicios de Digital Sales

01
Empathy at Our Core
La empatía es la piedra angular de nuestra filosofía de diseño. Forjamos relaciones sólidas con nuestros clientes, más allá del papel de simples proveedores. Así, los proyectos iniciales se transforman en colaboraciones a largo plazo que favorecen el crecimiento y el éxito continuado.
02
Proceso y entrega
Como agencia de Diseño, Data y Tecnología fundada por diseñadores, la excelencia está presente en todo lo que hacemos. Desde nuestro proceso único de diseño hasta la entrega final, garantizamos calidad e innovación en cada paso.
03
Soluciones End-to-End
Nuestros servicios abarcan todo el ciclo de vida de un producto o servicio. Participamos desde la definición estratégica, alineándonos con los objetivos de negocio, hasta la conceptualización y la implementación final, ofreciendo soluciones completas y coherentes.
04
Talento excepcional
Nuestro mayor valor es el equipo. Hemos reunido un grupo muy diverso de expertos multidisciplinares con un mismo compromiso: la excelencia. Su experiencia colectiva asegura resultados de primer nivel en cada proyecto.

Flexibilidad, rapidez y eficiencia.
Al colaborar con nosotros accedes a un amplio conjunto de habilidades especializadas que se integran con tu equipo actual.
Ofrecemos una gran variedad de perfiles profesionales capaces de cubrir todas tus necesidades. Nuestra filosofía end-to-end nos permite afrontar cualquier reto, desde IT y análisis de datos hasta diseño de productos digitales.
Nuestra misión es simple: encontrar a los profesionales ideales que complementen las fortalezas de tu equipo. Así podrás centrarte en tu objetivo principal mientras nosotros nos encargamos del resto, generando una sinergia que impulsa tus proyectos.

1. Data Collection
We integrate your analytical tools under the mantra of Data Quality, providing intelligence to your digital data. Whether it’s websites, apps, or any digital product, we prepare your analytical tools with a clear objective: to guarantee the quality of the data. This ensures that you can make informed decisions based on accurate insights, driving better engagement and results across all your digital platforms.
2. Data Analytics & Business Intelligence
We convert your needs into KPIs and create solutions that allow you to analyze and make decisions based on data. We analyze the data and guide you in making decisions through advanced and fully customized dashboards.
3. Sales Accelerator
A true hub of solutions to enhance your digital business. Through conversion rate optimization, personalization, and A/B testing strategies, we transform your data into sales opportunities. Our focus is on maximizing conversions and improving the customer experience, ensuring that every interaction is tailored to their needs. With our strategic actions, we not only optimize the performance of your digital assets but also drive your sales and foster stronger relationships with your customers. You choose how to take your business to the next level!
4. Data-Driven Enterprise
Testing early and often is the only way to avoid surprises and maximize results. We always test and measure the impact of the products and services we design.

Turnkey project
Model based on a closed budget in terms of scope and conditions in the execution of the service. In order to be able to execute a Fixed Price service, the functional, technical, and risk requirements of the project must be fully identified.
Managed service
It is a model based on trust that we recommend in projects under Scrum methodology, maintenance, and support. We provide a team fully managed by Garaje de ideas, offering a service that covers the existing needs. Costs and fees are invoiced monthly.
Time on materials
In this model we facilitate the incorporation of one or more people with a specific profile within your team to cover needs on a temporary basis. A daily rate will be agreed upon and the days incurred will be invoiced on a monthly basis.

Driving growth through digital strategy, design,
and technology.
We help businesses boost sales, improve customer experiences, and cut costs through data-driven strategies and cutting-edge technology. Our team crafts impactful solutions that optimize every stage of the customer journey, driving sustainable growth and maximizing ROI.

We drive growth across every stage of your funnel
We attract, engage, and convert customers at every stage of the funnel by combining Paid Media, SEO, and targeted content marketing. Through personalized touchpoints and automated email journeys, we guide prospects from awareness to decision, creating seamless experiences that maximize engagement and measurable results.
We turn user insights into conversions
We design smarter sales funnels by analyzing user behavior at every step. Through behavioral insights, A/B testing, and CRO techniques, we refine lead scoring, prioritize high-potential prospects, and craft powerful calls to action—boosting conversion rates and accelerating growth.
We personalize user experiences, everywhere
We turn insights into action by delivering dynamic, tailored experiences across websites, emails, and offers. By adapting content in real time to customer behaviors and preferences, we deepen engagement, build loyalty, and create connections that last.

clean_text:
GRUPO PAMPLING - Ofertas de empleo, oficinas y equipo
Valores
Ofertas de trabajo
¡Únete al Grupo Pampling! Join the Pampling Group!
Somos una empresa textil nacida en Sevilla hace más de 20 años, con presencia en España, Europa y Latinoamérica en más de 100 puntos de venta propios y también con un fuerte canal online que nos conecta con clientes de todo el mundo. Nuestra filosofía se basa en ofrecer moda original y sostenible, apostando por la creatividad, el talento global y la producción responsable. Contamos con marcas con personalidad propia: Pampling, Wituka, Pájaro Flama, Nerry, Nostalgic Apparel, Agobio, Catharsis, BM Collective, Citees, Pampling&Co, entre otras.
We are a textile company founded in Seville over 20 years ago, with a presence in Spain, Europe, and Latin America through more than 100 of our own retail locations. We also have a strong online channel that connects us with customers around the world. Our philosophy is based on offering original and sustainable fashion, driven by creativity, global talent, and responsible production. We have a portfolio of brands with their own unique personality, including Pampling, Wituka, Pájaro Flama, Nerry, Nostalgic Apparel, Agobio, Catharsis, BM Collective, Citees, Pampling&Co, among others.
Misión, visión & valores:
Hacemos ropa que cuenta historias
Cada diseño conecta personas, despierta emociones y arranca sonrisas. Trabajamos con artistas de todo el mundo para que cada prenda sea un reflejo auténtico de creatividad y humanidad.
Each design connects people, sparks emotions, and brings smiles. We collaborate with artists from all over the world to ensure every garment is a true reflection of creativity and humanity.
Más que ropa, una comunidad global
Queremos ser un lugar donde diseñadores, equipo y clientes compartan talento, ideas y buen rollo. Cada prenda es una pieza única que une culturas y personas con honestidad y cercanía.
We want to be a place where designers, our team, and customers share talent, ideas, and good vibes. Each garment is a unique piece that brings together cultures and people with honesty and closeness.
Personas detrás de cada diseño
Valoramos lo humano por encima de todo: detrás de cada pedido hay alguien que confía en nosotros y detrás de cada diseño, un creador real. Nos equivocamos, aprendemos y crecemos juntos.
We value the human side above all else: behind every order, there’s someone who trusts us, and behind every design, a real creator. We make mistakes, we learn, and we grow together.
Talento sin fronteras
Las buenas ideas no entienden de idiomas ni banderas. Colaboramos con creadores de cualquier rincón del mundo para ofrecer diseños únicos, con precios justos y calidad imbatible.
Good ideas know no language or borders. We collaborate with creators from every corner of the world to offer unique designs, fair prices, and unbeatable quality.
Detalles que importan
Cuidamos cada paso, desde la idea creativa hasta la prenda final que te llevas a casa. Queremos que tenerla en tus manos siempre signifique una sonrisa asegurada.
We take care of every step, from the creative idea to the final garment you take home. We want having it in your hands to always mean a guaranteed smile.
El equipo lo es todo
Nadie va solo: hacemos las cosas juntos, con pasión, buen rollo y mucho corazón. Somos un equipo imperfecto, pero lleno de energía y ganas de seguir creciendo contigo.
No one walks alone: we do things together, with passion, good vibes, and a lot of heart. We’re an imperfect team, but full of energy and eager to keep growing with you.

Modelo de negocio
Reproducir
Un modelo de negocio basado en la experiencia y la confianza mutua con el cliente
El Corte Inglés fundamenta su modelo empresarial en una serie de
principios éticos, sostenibles y responsables
hacia el cliente, los empleados, los proveedores, los accionistas, la sociedad y el medioambiente.
Desde el espíritu de mejora constante y de visión a largo plazo, El Corte Inglés ha ido
ampliando su propuesta de servicios al cliente
, tanto en retail como en no retail. Hoy, el Grupo El Corte Inglés es una
potente corporación empresarial
que incluye grandes almacenes, tiendas de moda, una cadena de supermercados, servicios financieros, agencias de viajes, y servicios de seguridad, entre otros negocios.
Estrenamos
nuevos tiempos.
Adoptamos
nuevos códigos
. El Corte Inglés ha sido capaz de evolucionar al ritmo de los nuevos tiempos y tendencias, manteniéndose fiel a los principios que lo caracterizan: calidad, variedad de surtido, servicio, innovación y garantía. Y todo, con la vocación de
satisfacer al cliente y acompañarlo
en todo momento. Unos valores compartidos con nuestro entorno y una muestra más del empeño por estar a la
vanguardia del comercio
ofreciendo un entorno amable y comprometido con la sociedad.
Una amplia propuesta de servicios
El
retail
ha sido y es el eje sobre el que se sustenta el modelo de negocio. Es el punto de partida que le ha permitido convertirse en uno de los grandes grupos empresariales en España y crecer en otro tipo de actividades.
El Corte Inglés es un creador de moda y generador de tendencias, pero también es el gran escaparate de las marcas en moda, hogar y decoración, belleza, deporte, electrónica y electrodomésticos, ocio y entretenimiento, y alimentación, entre otros. Y todo ello, tanto en el entorno físico como en el
online
.
Líneas de actividad
Retail
El retail es el corazón del negocio, el núcleo sobre el que se han construido las bases de un conjunto de empresas que comparten la vocación de facilitar la vida de las personas y establecer una relación de confianza con los clientes y el entorno.
Otros negocios del Grupo
La voluntad de transformar los desafíos en oportunidades nos ha permitido desarrollar distintas áreas de actividad y crear un conjunto de empresas que comparten la vocación por poner al cliente en el centro y los valores asociados a la marca El Corte Inglés.
CONOCE LAS EMPRESAS DEL GRUPO
Nuestro Desempeño ASG
Desde sus inicios, el Grupo El Corte Inglés integra pautas de actuación sostenibles en su modelo de negocio. La compañía cuenta con un
Plan Director de Sostenibilidad
, que define las iniciativas y objetivos específicos, y con la
Política de Sostenibilidad
, que establecen el marco de actuación y los principios rectores en esta materia. Esto contribuye a la generación de confianza y valor compartido.
Avance sostenible

Sobre Casusbelli Capital S.l.u.
La empresa informa que su actividad es compra suscripcion, tenencia, permuta y venta de valores, mobiliarios nacionales o extranjeros, por su propia cuenta y sin actividad de intermediación, salvo las actividades reservadas para la ley de inst. inv.colectiva, etc. La empresa es una Sociedad Limitada. Tiene CNAE 2009: 4759 - 'Comercio al por menor de muebles, aparatos de iluminación y otros artículos de uso doméstico en establecimientos especializados'. La compañía no tiene actividad en mercados exteriores.
El número de empleados ha disminuido un 20% y según las cifras existentes en la base de datos de INFORMA, el número de empleados ha estado por encima de la media de sector.
Dentro del ranking de empresas elaborado por INFORMA, atendiendo a los niveles de facturación, podemos decir de la compañía que: en 2024, la empresa ha ganado 144 posiciones en el ranking sectorial, pasando del 1.314 al 1.170. Tienen mejor posición las siguientes empresas del sector:
Home & Space Design S.L
y
964 Colorin Colorado S.L
; en cambio, por debajo se encuentran empresas como:
Ilersofa S.L
y
Diseños López Cocinas Sociedad Limitada
. Ha ganado 2.340 puestos en el ranking nacional, pasando del 182.625 al 182.625. Se encuentran en una mejor posición las siguientes empresas:
Operador de Transportes Sella S.L
y
Gosoc S.L
, en cambio, entre las empresas que están por debajo, se encuentran:
2019 Ibi S.L
y
Ferreiro Garcia S.A
. Se ha posicionado peor pasando del puesto 32.950 al 33.404 en el ranking provincial, perdiendo hasta 454 puestos respecto al año anterior.
Su email es
admin@bellicapital.com
.
La empresa española
Casusbelli Capital S.L.U
, con número de identificación fiscal B67154070, se encuentra en Calle Colombia núm. 63 Piso 4, (28016), en el municipio de Madrid, Madrid.
En relación con el sector y disponiendo de los datos de hasta 25.478 empresas, en el ámbito nacional la facturación alcanza la cifra de 8.263 millones de euros y en 2024 la media de facturación de ventas entre todas las compañías alcanza los 324 mil euros. Teniendo en cuenta la información sobre Madrid, en la base de datos de INFORMA aparecen 4639 empresas, cuyas ventas han obtenido los 3.042 millones de euros. Con el fin de ampliar la información relativa a las compañías, los empleados de media son 2; la antigüedad alcanza los 21 años desde la constitución.
En conclusión,
Casusbelli Capital S.L.U
está especializada en compra suscripcion, tenencia, permuta y venta de valores, mobiliarios nacionales o extranjeros, por su propia cuenta y sin actividad de intermediación, salvo las actividades reservadas para la ley de inst. inv.colectiva, etc. En el ranking de su sector, es decir Comercio al por menor de muebles, aparatos de iluminación y otros artículos de uso doméstico en establecimientos especializados, ha experimentado una subida. En cuanto al ranking nacional, la empresa ha ganado posiciones.

Nuestra amplia experiencia y nuestras herramientas especializadas te ayudarán a evitar multas y sanciones, proteger la privacidad de tus datos y mantener tu negocio en línea con las regulaciones aplicables.

MÁS SOBRE MIA
Timeline ECIX TECH:
Contamos con más de 20 años de experiencia asesorando a las principales compañías en España y a nivel global.
Enero 2023
Ecix Group se convierte en ECIXTech la primera RegTech española.
Noviembre 2022
MIA recibe el premio Legal Marcom 2022 a la innovación en la Gala Nacional del Derecho.
Septiembre 2022
MIA incorpora un módulo específico de Blanqueo de Capitales para el control de las operaciones y el cumplimiento normativo.
Mayo 2022
MIA amplia su ámbito de actuación incorporando un módulo de Seguridad de la Información con: ENS, DORA, SWIFT e ISO 27001.
Febrero 2022
Lanzamiento Legal X el primer servicio que integra procesos+tecnología+personas para agilizar la revisión y tratamientos de grandes volúmenes de información.
Septiembre 2021
Lanzamiento de MIA, la primera Inteligencia Artificial que detecta Brechas Legales en las compañías en diferentes marcos normativos.
Enero 2019
ElixTech, firma 100% del Grupo, abre mercado con la venta de software en LATAM.
Enero 2018
Ecix abre oficinas en Barcelona y Zaragoza.
Enero 2017
Ecix desarrolla con la Universidad Complutense de Madrid una metodología de Análisis de Riesgos.
Enero 2016
Ecix crea ElixTech, la primera empresa Legal Tech que desarrolla y comercializa software de Compliance.
Enero 2015
Ecix desarrolla y crea el área de Ciberderecho.
Enero 2014
A raíz de un proceso de transformación, Ecix, se convierte en una firma especializada en consultoría de Compliance.
Enero 2013
Ecix desarrolla y crea el área de CSV (Compliance Software Value).
Enero 2012
Ecix Group y Coosbay Investments firman la separación de Écija en dos firmas. Ecix explota el área de Compliance y el software y Coosbay el área Legal.
Septiembre 2002
Ecix Group crea el área de I+D y lanza al mercado el primer software de Compliance y Privacidad «ePrivacy».
Enero 2000
Ecix Group amplía y lidera el área de Compliance Écija.
Enero 1996
Ecix Group (Álvaro Écija) y Coosbay Investments (Hugo Écija) fundan Écija Abogados al 50%.

Misión, visión y valores
El
origen
de la Fundación El Tranvía está en la participación de la
Asociación Vecinal “Las Fuentes”
de Zaragoza, en un programa de erradicación del chabolismo (1988 – 1994). Con esta acción la Asociación toma conciencia de la importancia de crear recursos comunitarios transversales y de la necesidad de una gestión especializada de los mismos. Fruto de ello se crea en el año 1995 el Centro de Recursos Comunitarios, ubicado en la parte más desfavorecida del barrio, como lugar pensado y gestionado por los vecinos/as para brindar oportunidades de crecimiento educativo, social, laboral y comunitario.
En 1996 el Centro dio lugar a La Fundación
para avanzar en estos objetivos.
El origen ciudadano y asociativo de la Fundación da significado a la importancia del
desarrollo comunitario
que la caracteriza. Este aspecto sirve de paraguas a todas las acciones y es fundamental para la creación de redes humanas que sirvan para empoderar tanto a la población en exclusión como a aquella que no lo está y como alternativa socializadora al gueto que permita la mejora personal y colectiva.
Los
fines fundacionales
se alcanzan mediante el diseño e implementación de
programas y proyectos
desarrollados en el marco de un
plan comunitario
integral. La Fundación trabaja en diferentes
áreas
atendiendo a toda la población: infancia, juventud, personas adultas, mayores.
Nuestros valores
COMPROMISO
Con los procesos de cambio y transformación de nuestra sociedad, con los valores democráticos y participativos.
SOLIDARIDAD
Con los más desfavorecidos en todos los ámbitos de intervención.
RESPONSABILIDAD
En las actuaciones que asumimos, en la participación social, en la elaboración de propuestas y proyectos.
TRANSPARENCIA
En la gestión de fondos y en la información.
CONSUMO RESPONSABLE
Entendido desde un concepto ecológico.
De dónde venimos, nuestros ORIGENES
Fundación El Tranvía, es una organización sin ánimo de lucro que nace en el año 1995 de la mano de la Asociación de Vecinos Las Fuentes para dar respuesta a las necesidades del barrio…
Hoy en día, a pesar de haber incrementado su actividad y su ámbito de actuación, mantiene su estrecha vinculación con el Barrio de las Fuentes.
Hace que tengamos una MISIÓN muy clara
Trabajar, integrados en la comunidad, para mejorar la cohesión social, la calidad de vida y las oportunidades de las personas y familias más vulnerables, situando a las personas en el centro de todas nuestras actuaciones.
Y saber a dónde queremos llegar: VISIÓN
Ser una organización referente en Aragón en el acompañamiento y atención a las personas y familias vulnerables, a través de su inserción en la comunidad, la promoción de la igualdad de oportunidades y el impulso de la transformación social.

¿Qué es una cookie?
No obstante, estos medios sólo obtienen información relacionada con el número de páginas visitadas, la ciudad a la que está asignada la dirección IP desde la que se accede, el número de nuevos usuarios, la frecuencia y reincidencia de las visitas, el tiempo de visita, el navegador o el operador o tipo de terminal desde el que se realiza la visita. No se obtienen datos sobre el nombre, apellidos, dirección postal u otros datos análogos del usuario que se ha conectado.
Las
Las
Las
son aquellas que permiten comprender cómo interactúan los visitantes con las páginas web y así realizar el análisis estadístico de la utilización que hacen los usuarios de los servicios prestados. La información recogida se utiliza en la medición de la actividad de los sitios web o aplicación con el fin de introducir mejoras en los productos y servicios ofrecidos por el responsable.
Las
almacenan información del comportamiento de los usuarios obtenida a través de la observación continuada de sus hábitos de navegación, lo que permite desarrollar un perfil específico para mostrar anuncios relevantes y atractivos para el usuario individual y, por tanto, más valiosos para los terceros anunciantes.
Por otra parte,
Además,
En las condiciones previstas en el Reglamento General de Protección de Datos, los interesados podrán solicitar la limitación del tratamiento de sus datos o su portabilidad, en cuyo caso únicamente los conservaremos para el ejercicio o la defensa de reclamaciones.
En determinadas circunstancias y por motivos relacionados con su situación particular, los interesados podrán oponerse al tratamiento de sus datos. Si usted ha otorgado el consentimiento para alguna finalidad específica, tiene derecho a retirarlo en cualquier momento, sin que ello afecte a la licitud del tratamiento basado en el consentimiento previo a su retirada. En estos supuestos dejaremos de tratar los datos o, en su caso, dejaremos de hacerlo para esa finalidad en concreto, salvo por motivos legítimos imperiosos, o el ejercicio o la defensa de posibles reclamaciones.
Frente a cualquier vulneración de sus derechos, especialmente cuando usted no haya obtenido satisfacción en su ejercicio, puede presentar una reclamación ante la Agencia Española de Protección de Datos (datos de contacto accesibles en www.aepd.es), u otra autoridad de control competente. También puede obtener más información sobre los derechos que le asisten dirigiéndose a dichos organismos.
Microsoft Internet Explorer: menú Herramientas > Opciones de Internet > Privacidad > Configuración.
Chrome: menú Opciones > Opciones avanzadas > Privacidad.
Safari: menú Preferencias/Privacidad.
Safari para IOS (iPhone y iPad): Opción Ajustes > Safari

Conócenos
Lefebvre es el socio
estratégico que impulsa
el sector legal
Conocimiento experto y tecnología
al servicio de los profesionales
Ayudamos a avanzar a nuestros clientes con claridad, rigor y certeza jurídica, proporcionándoles una oferta integral construida sobre tres pilares:
Conocimiento
Acceso al conocimiento más fiable y actualizado del sector legal. Desde los Mementos (las obras de referencia jurídica en España), hasta bases de datos especializadas y alertas normativas.
Software
Soluciones tecnológicas desarrolladas para facilitar el cumplimiento, la gestión y la eficiencia de los equipos jurídicos, como Centinela (nuestro sistema de vigilancia normativa) o herramientas para la gestión de despachos.
Formación
Programas diseñados para acompañar la evolución continua del profesional jurídico. Formación práctica, actualizada y conectada con los retos reales del sector, incluyendo contenidos esenciales y tendencias emergentes.
Conoce más sobre nuestras soluciones
Formamos parte del Grupo Lefebvre, líder europeo en conocimiento legal y fiscal
Creado en 1999 a partir de la unión de dos familias, el Grupo Lefebvre ha experimentado desde entonces un importante crecimiento en toda Europa. Actualmente cuenta con más de 2.500 empleados y factura 555 millones de euros.
555M €
Facturación
8
Países
2.500
Empleados
Se estructura en torno a tres mercados:
Empresas de todos los tamaños, actividades económicas y forma jurídica.
Instituciones públicas nacionales e internacionales, incluidos los gobiernos nacionales y la Unión Europea.
Profesiones reguladas: abogados, contables, notarios, procuradores, magistrados.
Activamos el conocimiento para una sociedad más justa, eficiente y sostenible
Conectados a una visión internacional y con un profundo conocimiento del entorno local, creemos en el poder del conocimiento cuando se entiende, se comparte y se aplica.
No se trata solo de tener la información, sino de saber usarla para avanzar, decidir con criterio y transformar realidades. Ese es el propósito que guía cada uno de nuestros pasos y que expresamos a través de
nuestros valores:
Excelencia
Excelencia para ofrecer contenido fiable, formación de alta calidad y software innovador.
Anticipamos las necesidades de nuestros clientes, superamos sus expectativas y contribuimos a su éxito persiguiendo la mejora continua.
Colaboración
Fomentamos una cultura de colaboración, conocimiento y expertise compartidos.
Construimos una comunidad que apoya a los profesionales y promueve el intercambio de información valiosa para mejorar las prácticas empresariales.
Cercanía
Cultivamos una cultura de comunicación y relaciones sólidas. Promovemos un ecosistema basado en la contribución, la comprensión y el respeto para alcanzar el éxito colectivo y ofrecer una experiencia única a nuestros clientes, empleados y comunidad.
La innovación es parte de nuestro ADN
Somos la primera compañía en lanzar una solución legal de inteligencia artificial generativa en Europa.
GenIA-L
es una herramienta pionera basada en los Mementos de Lefebvre y otras fuentes actualizadas y contrastadas, diseñada para dar respuestas fiables, trazables y con certeza jurídica.
Descubre GenIA-L
GenIA-L
Certeza jurídica
Ética, transparencia y sostenibilidad en todo lo que hacemos
En Lefebvre nos mueven las personas. Por eso nos preocupamos por las necesidades de nuestros trabajadores y colaboradores no solo a nivel profesional, sino también a nivel personal.
Conoce nuestros compromisos
Seguridad a cada paso
Nuestras soluciones están auditadas y certificadas bajo los estándares más exigentes del sector. Protegemos cada dato, cada proceso y cada decisión con tecnología segura y verificada.
ISO 27001
ISO 9001
ISO 4200

sobre nosotros
sobre nosotros_
Encuentra tu óptica más cercana
Somos la compañía líder en el sector óptico
con mayor cuota de mercado en España. Contamos con 40 años de experiencia y, actualmente, somos más de 300 socios y colaboradores, contamos con una red de distribución con más de 600 ópticas y más de 2.000 profesionales en el territorio nacional. Dirigida bajo un modelo cooperativista, referente en términos de facturación, número de establecimientos y profesionales asociados.
Además, somos la marca más reconocida por el consumidor y contamos con
marca propia de gafas: MÓ,
superando el millón de gafas vendidas al año. Ofrecemos una atención integral al consumidor, preservando la
salud visual
con la mayor garantía y profesionalidad y acercando la moda y últimas tendencias con más de mil modelos para elegir para todas las edades y con la mejor calidad-precio.
Además, como parte de nuestro compromiso con la salud visual, a través de Fundación Multiópticas, ayudamos a personas y comunidades más vulnerables ofreciéndoles atención en salud visual y donando gafas a través de programas propios o colaboraciones con entidades de reconocido prestigio en el ámbito de la solidaridad.

Learn more about GENEO's Lean Consulting and Software
GENEO has built a great team of Lean consultants to work alongside our agile software team. We are focused on building the best Continuous Improvement platform for our clients. Whether you are looking for a light touch training program or a complete transformation, GENEO is here to help.
We recognize that Lean consulting is about culture and people, so we put our people at the heart of everything. GENEO has applied the Lean principles to every aspect of our business. We used the agile approach for software development, meeting our ISO9000 standard goals.
Our experience spans two decades of hands-on Lean implementation, starting with the founders of GENEO Software: Mark Radley and Tim King. GENEO's Lean consulting team has experience across heavy industries, mining, aviation, automotive, pharmaceutical, medical devices, and logistics. Our tacit knowledge has helped build a suite of software applications made with the Lean customer in mind.
Our software team has built the best enterprise system for standardized work (also known as work instructions) and is supporting companies with their continuous improvement journey. And in 2019, we successfully launched two new platforms to help Lean leaders in the field optimize their continuous improvement activities.
You can check these out on our
software
page. If it is consulting you are interested in, please go to our
consulting
page.
GENEO's Lean consulting and software business is growing fast, with a presence in the USA, UK, Australia, Denmark, and Germany. Wherever you are, whatever your footprint, GENEO can support your Lean aspirations.
Mark Radley
Director and Founder
Mark is an expert in Lean transformations. His operations experience covers aerospace and aviation, automotive, mining, healthcare, energy services and life sciences. His experience in leading change and developing operating systems for organisations has helped shape the GENEO software.
Tim King
Director and Founder
Tim is the key architect of the GENEO Software with an early vision of how the digital world must twin the reality of operations. Tim started as a product engineer in fast moving consumer goods and brings his quality approach to GENEO’s agile software engineering. Prior to starting GENEO, Tim ran his own manufacturing business.
Bob Newton
Director
Bob’s background in learning and development, material science and CAD makes him a perfect fit as head of Software Training and Legacy Systems. Bob’s expertise in standardised work together with his software knowledge and L&D background means he can provide start -to-finish support for clients implementing Lean in their organisation.
Chris Jones
Director
Chris is a seasoned consultant in Lean with over twenty years of coaching and consulting across different industries. Chris has turned his knowledge of Operational Excellence towards benefiting clients across diverse value chains, from mining, smelting, healthcare and automotive to pharmaceuticals.
Ewan McLellan
Non Executive Director
Ewan is a non executive director bringing a wealth of experience from his time with Cap Gemini as Head of Strategy and Operations and his later role as CEO of Future Fibres. Ewan was the beta client for GENEO Software and shares the vision of building a platform to capture the ‘how’ of making products and processes effective.
Jenni Essien
Senior Software Engineer
Jenni is a senior software engineer with GENEO Software and plays an integral part in the features and functionality of the application. Jenni joined GENEO in its fledgling days and has helped shape the DNA of the software team’s approach to development.
Joanna Rhodes
Director of Software Development
Jo is a senior software engineer with GENEO Software and is a relative newcomer joining the company in 2017 after completing her MSc at Birmingham University. Jo is one of GENEO’s lead developers on features for clients having delivered two significant additional modules since her start with the team. Jo is responsible for our graduate recruitment programme.
Winston Brown
Non Executive Director
Winston is a non executive director with GENEO Software. Winston has supported GENEO Software for the last 6 years and provided direction on process and quality during our software engineering journey. With a passion for quality and customer service, Winston has played a vital part in helping our team and company grow.
Vlad Dumitrache
Software Engineer
Vlad joined GENEO Software mid-2018 from a background of biomedical engineering and material science. As a full-stack developer, Vlad plays a vital role in the company’s cloud infrastructure maintenance, alongside his many significant contributions to the general development of the GENEO application.
Peter Vaclavik
Software Engineer
Peter joined GENEO in 2016 as our principal front end developer and this has meant his contributions reach right across the GENEO Software front end. Meticulous attention to detail has provided the robustness and uniformity necessary to deliver a comfortable UX. One of Peter’s most recent contributions are in the delivery of mobile device presentation of standards.
Sam Wolff
Software Engineer
Already working with GENEO for one year Sam completed his MSc in Computer Science at the University of Birmingham in 2018. Aside from the duties associated with general software development at GENEO, he has been key to GENEO’s successful accreditation in ISO 9001 and in the development of the Academy feature.
What we offer
Software
Lean software from GENEO
We have channeled our knowledge and expertise to create unique software to help companies create a digital twin of their operations.
GEN-OPS1 enables operations to rapidly capture and control standardized work at the element level of the operation. TEMPO provides maintenance supervisors with a workshop platform to optimize planned maintenance execution and implement short-interval control that lower turnarounds, clears backlogs, and drives up availability. myCI is an intuitive, flexible, and powerful mobile platform to accelerate and broaden workforce contribution to continuous improvement.
It's never been easier to regain control of your operational excellence journey.
Learn how GENEO software can help your business
Consulting
Lean Consulting Leading you to Operational Excellence
Our team of Lean Consultants has decades of experience across a range of industry sectors. We can guide your leaders in how and why Lean Thinking leads to operational excellence. Sustainability is our mantra. Our risk-prevention improvement method begins by enabling change through leadership workshops to agree on the Lean strategy and the Operating System. By reviewing the principles of Lean, its benefits, and its consequences, we can avoid expensive mistakes before full operational deployment.
We will demonstrate by 'doing' and building a model for your business that your leadership and workforce can learn and adapt. This model will relate to your company's needs and the essential needs of your clients. GENEO's Lean consulting will lead you to operational excellence.
Finally, our lean consultants will help move your company from the initial model to a broader deployment with sustainable results.
Learn how GENEO consulting services can help your business
The Academy
Sustain your Lean organization with The Academy
GENEO provides support for organizations to build-in sustainability around their Lean operating system. We help you build your curriculum, add your delegates, and coach online with Lean Academy.
We have built a powerful yet straightforward learning platform to match the development needs of your workforce. In a matter of days, you can launch learning programs rich in content to train your delegates and capture their evidence-based learning.
Design your modules and units on the subject matter, load your learning outcomes and the support material, then coach your cohorts online.
The GENEO Academy provides real-time visibility of cohort and delegate progress. Transparency of learning is one click away.
Learn how Lean training software can help your business

Reduce maintenance turnaround time by 50%!
TEMPO is a system that has been developed to radically reduce the time taken to perform complex maintenance activities on fixed assets or fleet. It is a simple yet intelligent
 way of organizing your maintenance activities to complete the maintenance turnaround in half the time.
By organizing work sequences for trades/technicians and building critical paths and dependencies, TEMPO quickly highlights lost time opportunities in the overall planned
 turnaround.
Applying standard work instructions with step-by-step guides for process confirmation, TEMPO visualizes real-time progress for short interval control, providing instant
 decision making to maintain compliance to plan.
By using TEMPO to plan and execute complex maintenance turnarounds our clients have achieved 50%+ reduction in downtime, giving a 10%+ improvement in fleet availability.
Reduce maintenance backlog by 60%!
Unlock valuable maintenance time and use it to reduce chronic backlogs or stubborn deferred defects.
Give technicians more time for proactive interventions.
Improve asset reliability by 18%!
Enjoy the knock-on benefit of backlog clearance and proactive activities, improving the reliability of your assets.
Increase continuous improvement engagement by 180%!
TEMPO’s easy-to-use Concerns and Ideas capture feature engages technicians in driving improvements that help improve turnarounds, reliability, and availability
Identify the classic wastes (transport, inventory, motion, waiting, over processing, over production, defect) in relation to your maintenance activities.
Expose supply chain, kitting, resourcing, workplace organization, sequencing, tooling, and planning opportunities for review through TEMPO’s powerful reporting feature.
Analyze the hour-by-hour compliance to plan with the associated losses incurred throughout the turnaround event.

Purposes & Features
Purposes (11)
Store and/or access information on a device
Consent
Illustrations
Most purposes explained in this notice rely on the storage or accessing of information from your device when you use an app or visit a website. For example, a vendor or publisher might need to store a cookie on your device during your first visit on a website, to be able to recognise your device during your next visits (by accessing this cookie each time).
Number of Vendors seeking consent: 758
Use limited data to select advertising
Legitimate Interest
Consent
Advertising presented to you on this service can be based on limited data, such as the website or app you are using, your non-precise location, your device type or which content you are (or have been) interacting with (for example, to limit the number of times an ad is presented to you).
Illustrations
A car manufacturer wants to promote its electric vehicles to environmentally conscious users living in the city after office hours. The advertising is presented on a page with related content (such as an article on climate change actions) after 6:30 p.m. to users whose non-precise location suggests that they are in an urban zone.
A large producer of watercolour paints wants to carry out an online advertising campaign for its latest watercolour range, diversifying its audience to reach as many amateur and professional artists as possible and avoiding showing the ad next to mismatched content (for instance, articles about how to paint your house). The number of times that the ad has been presented to you is detected and limited, to avoid presenting it too often.
Number of Vendors seeking consent or relying on legitimate interest: 721
Create profiles for personalised advertising
Consent
Information about your activity on this service (such as forms you submit, content you look at) can be stored and combined with other information about you (for example, information from your previous activity on this service and other websites or apps) or similar users. This is then used to build or improve a profile about you (that might include possible interests and personal aspects). Your profile can be used (also later) to present advertising that appears more relevant based on your possible interests by this and other entities.
Illustrations
If you read several articles about the best bike accessories to buy, this information could be used to create a profile about your interest in bike accessories. Such a profile may be used or improved later on, on the same or a different website or app to present you with advertising for a particular bike accessory brand. If you also look at a configurator for a vehicle on a luxury car manufacturer website, this information could be combined with your interest in bikes to refine your profile and make an assumption that you are interested in luxury cycling gear.
An apparel company wishes to promote its new line of high-end baby clothes. It gets in touch with an agency that has a network of clients with high income customers (such as high-end supermarkets) and asks the agency to create profiles of young parents or couples who can be assumed to be wealthy and to have a new child, so that these can later be used to present advertising within partner apps based on those profiles.
Number of Vendors seeking consent: 578
Use profiles to select personalised advertising
Consent
Advertising presented to you on this service can be based on your advertising profiles, which can reflect your activity on this service or other websites or apps (like the forms you submit, content you look at), possible interests and personal aspects.
Illustrations
An online retailer wants to advertise a limited sale on running shoes. It wants to target advertising to users who previously looked at running shoes on its mobile app. Tracking technologies might be used to recognise that you have previously used the mobile app to consult running shoes, in order to present you with the corresponding advertisement on the app.
A profile created for personalised advertising in relation to a person having searched for bike accessories on a website can be used to present the relevant advertisement for bike accessories on a mobile app of another organisation.
Number of Vendors seeking consent: 583
Create profiles to personalise content
Consent
Information about your activity on this service (for instance, forms you submit, non-advertising content you look at) can be stored and combined with other information about you (such as your previous activity on this service or other websites or apps) or similar users. This is then used to build or improve a profile about you (which might for example include possible interests and personal aspects). Your profile can be used (also later) to present content that appears more relevant based on your possible interests, such as by adapting the order in which content is shown to you, so that it is even easier for you to find content that matches your interests.
Illustrations
You read several articles on how to build a treehouse on a social media platform. This information might be added to a profile to mark your interest in content related to outdoors as well as do-it-yourself guides (with the objective of allowing the personalisation of content, so that for example you are presented with more blog posts and articles on treehouses and wood cabins in the future).
You have viewed three videos on space exploration across different TV apps. An unrelated news platform with which you have had no contact builds a profile based on that viewing behaviour, marking space exploration as a topic of possible interest for other videos.
Number of Vendors seeking consent: 254
Use profiles to select personalised content
Consent
Content presented to you on this service can be based on your content personalisation profiles, which can reflect your activity on this or other services (for instance, the forms you submit, content you look at), possible interests and personal aspects. This can for example be used to adapt the order in which content is shown to you, so that it is even easier for you to find (non-advertising) content that matches your interests.
Illustrations
You read articles on vegetarian food on a social media platform and then use the cooking app of an unrelated company. The profile built about you on the social media platform will be used to present you vegetarian recipes on the welcome screen of the cooking app.
You have viewed three videos about rowing across different websites. An unrelated video sharing platform will recommend five other videos on rowing that may be of interest to you when you use your TV app, based on a profile built about you when you visited those different websites to watch online videos.
Number of Vendors seeking consent: 227
Measure advertising performance
Legitimate Interest
Consent
Information regarding which advertising is presented to you and how you interact with it can be used to determine how well an advert has worked for you or other users and whether the goals of the advertising were reached. For instance, whether you saw an ad, whether you clicked on it, whether it led you to buy a product or visit a website, etc. This is very helpful to understand the relevance of advertising campaigns.
Illustrations
You have clicked on an advertisement about a “black Friday” discount by an online shop on the website of a publisher and purchased a product. Your click will be linked to this purchase. Your interaction and that of other users will be measured to know how many clicks on the ad led to a purchase.
You are one of very few to have clicked on an advertisement about an “international appreciation day” discount by an online gift shop within the app of a publisher. The publisher wants to have reports to understand how often a specific ad placement within the app, and notably the “international appreciation day” ad, has been viewed or clicked by you and other users, in order to help the publisher and its partners (such as agencies) optimise ad placements.
Number of Vendors seeking consent or relying on legitimate interest: 827
Measure content performance
Legitimate Interest
Consent
Information regarding which content is presented to you and how you interact with it can be used to determine whether the (non-advertising) content e.g. reached its intended audience and matched your interests. For instance, whether you read an article, watch a video, listen to a podcast or look at a product description, how long you spent on this service and the web pages you visit etc. This is very helpful to understand the relevance of (non-advertising) content that is shown to you.
Illustrations
You have read a blog post about hiking on a mobile app of a publisher and followed a link to a recommended and related post. Your interactions will be recorded as showing that the initial hiking post was useful to you and that it was successful in interesting you in the related post. This will be measured to know whether to produce more posts on hiking in the future and where to place them on the home screen of the mobile app.
You were presented a video on fashion trends, but you and several other users stopped watching after 30 seconds. This information is then used to evaluate the right length of future videos on fashion trends.
Number of Vendors seeking consent or relying on legitimate interest: 392
Understand audiences through statistics or combinations of data from different sources
Legitimate Interest
Consent
Reports can be generated based on the combination of data sets (like user profiles, statistics, market research, analytics data) regarding your interactions and those of other users with advertising or (non-advertising) content to identify common characteristics (for instance, to determine which target audiences are more receptive to an ad campaign or to certain contents).
Illustrations
The owner of an online bookstore wants commercial reporting showing the proportion of visitors who consulted and left its site without buying, or consulted and bought the last celebrity autobiography of the month, as well as the average age and the male/female distribution of each category. Data relating to your navigation on its site and to your personal characteristics is then used and combined with other such data to produce these statistics.
An advertiser wants to better understand the type of audience interacting with its adverts. It calls upon a research institute to compare the characteristics of users who interacted with the ad with typical attributes of users of similar platforms, across different devices. This comparison reveals to the advertiser that its ad audience is mainly accessing the adverts through mobile devices and is likely in the 45-60 age range.
Number of Vendors seeking consent or relying on legitimate interest: 529
Develop and improve services
Legitimate Interest
Consent
Information about your activity on this service, such as your interaction with ads or content, can be very helpful to improve products and services and to build new products and services based on user interactions, the type of audience, etc. This specific purpose does not include the development or improvement of user profiles and identifiers.
Illustrations
A technology platform working with a social media provider notices a growth in mobile app users, and sees based on their profiles that many of them are connecting through mobile connections. It uses a new technology to deliver ads that are formatted for mobile devices and that are low-bandwidth, to improve their performance.
An advertiser is looking for a way to display ads on a new type of consumer device. It collects information regarding the way users interact with this new kind of device to determine whether it can build a new mechanism for displaying advertising on this type of device.
Number of Vendors seeking consent or relying on legitimate interest: 619
Use limited data to select content
Legitimate Interest
Consent
Content presented to you on this service can be based on limited data, such as the website or app you are using, your non-precise location, your device type, or which content you are (or have been) interacting with (for example, to limit the number of times a video or an article is presented to you).
Illustrations
A travel magazine has published an article on its website about the new online courses proposed by a language school, to improve travelling experiences abroad. The school’s blog posts are inserted directly at the bottom of the page, and selected on the basis of your non-precise location (for instance, blog posts explaining the course curriculum for different languages than the language of the country you are situated in).
A sports news mobile app has started a new section of articles covering the most recent football games. Each article includes videos hosted by a separate streaming platform showcasing the highlights of each match. If you fast-forward a video, this information may be used to select a shorter video to play next.
Number of Vendors seeking consent or relying on legitimate interest: 168
Special Purposes (3)
Ensure security, prevent and detect fraud, and fix errors
Your data can be used to monitor for and prevent unusual and possibly fraudulent activity (for example, regarding advertising, ad clicks by bots), and ensure systems and processes work properly and securely. It can also be used to correct any problems you, the publisher or the advertiser may encounter in the delivery of content and ads and in your interaction with them.
Illustrations
An advertising intermediary delivers ads from various advertisers to its network of partnering websites. It notices a large increase in clicks on ads relating to one advertiser, and uses data regarding the source of the clicks to determine that 80% of the clicks come from bots rather than humans.
Number of Vendors seeking consent: 584
Deliver and present advertising and content
Certain information (like an IP address or device capabilities) is used to ensure the technical compatibility of the content or advertising, and to facilitate the transmission of the content or ad to your device.
Illustrations
Clicking on a link in an article might normally send you to another page or part of the article. To achieve this, 1°) your browser sends a request to a server linked to the website, 2°) the server answers back (“here is the article you asked for”), using technical information automatically included in the request sent by your device, to properly display the information / images that are part of the article you asked for. Technically, such exchange of information is necessary to deliver the content that appears on your screen.
Number of Vendors seeking consent: 583
Save and communicate privacy choices
The choices you make regarding the purposes and entities listed in this notice are saved and made available to those entities in the form of digital signals (such as a string of characters). This is necessary in order to enable both this service and those entities to respect such choices.
Illustrations
When you visit a website and are offered a choice between consenting to the use of profiles for personalised advertising or not consenting, the choice you make is saved and made available to advertising providers, so that advertising presented to you respects that choice.
Number of Vendors seeking consent: 432
Features (3)
Match and combine data from other data sources
Information about your activity on this service may be matched and combined with other information relating to you and originating from various sources (for instance your activity on a separate online service, your use of a loyalty card in-store, or your answers to a survey), in support of the purposes explained in this notice.
Number of Vendors seeking consent: 420
Link different devices
In support of the purposes explained in this notice, your device might be considered as likely linked to other devices that belong to you or your household (for instance because you are logged in to the same service on both your phone and your computer, or because you may use the same Internet connection on both devices).
Number of Vendors seeking consent: 359
Identify devices based on information transmitted automatically
Your device might be distinguished from other devices based on information it automatically sends when accessing the Internet (for instance, the IP address of your Internet connection or the type of browser you are using) in support of the purposes exposed in this notice.
Number of Vendors seeking consent: 546
Special Features (2)
Use precise geolocation data
Consent
With your acceptance, your precise location (within a radius of less than 500 metres) may be used in support of the purposes explained in this notice.
Number of Vendors seeking consent: 280
Actively scan device characteristics for identification
Consent
With your acceptance, certain characteristics specific to your device might be requested and used to distinguish it from other devices (such as the installed fonts or plugins, the resolution of your screen) in support of the purposes explained in this notice.
Number of Vendors seeking consent: 152

About Adevinta
Adevinta is a leading online classifieds group and champion for sustainable commerce across Europe and beyond. With digital marketplaces across many countries, our portfolio spans consumer goods, mobility, real estate, holiday rentals and jobs. Together, our marketplaces attract more than 120 million users every month and over a million businesses.
Connecting People and Businesses across
Europe
and Beyond
Read more about our local brands
We exist to help everything and everyone find a new purpose. We do this by creating perfect matches through our internationally connected and locally loved marketplaces.
Driven by Technology and Talent
We employ over 5,200* talented individuals globally to power our marketplaces. This includes more than 2,500 experts working in product and technology.
Our diverse team is united by the same goal – to shape the future of sustainable commerce by making a positive impact on the environment, economy and society.
* excluding JVs and countries divested during 2023

Kleinanzeigen is a free online classifieds marketplace that brings the joy of sustainable trade to everyone.
L'Argus is one of France’s leading players in digital marketing services to the French automotive industry.
As one of the country's most visited websites, leboncoin is France’s go-to destination for buying, selling and matching top talents with great companies.
Locasun is a holiday rental and travel specialist based in France that focuses on B2C online reservations of holiday properties across Europe.
The MachineryZone site specialises in the sale and purchase of used and new public works, transport and handling equipment in France.
Marktplaats is the Netherlands' favorite online source for selling or buying anything you could possibly want, from boats and services to clothing and cars.
Milanuncios is a Spanish generalist online classifieds website and app, connecting buyers and sellers to make secure transactions.
The most popular marketplace for vehicles in Germany for both private and professional dealers, mobile.de also reaches international buyers and sellers.
Motos.net simplifies the process of buying and selling motorbikes with a focus on the optimal user experience, making them the market leader in Spain year after year.
OLX is the market leader in generalist online classifieds in Brazil, reinventing the consumption model and particularly popular for cars and real estate.
Subito is Italy’s leading online classifieds service and is among the top ten most visited websites in Italy, as well as being the favorite app for buying products.
A classified ad portal specialising in the sale and purchase of used lorries and HGVs in France, Europe and on an international level.
Willhaben is Austria's biggest digital marketplace as a result of their large number of ads with a focus on delivering a great customer experience.
Zap develops products, intelligence, services and information within the real estate market all over Brazil. Zap was formerly known as Grupo Zap.

What makes us Kova

ABOUT US
Awesome group,
awesome team
We are a dynamic team of visionaries, technologists, and strategists, committed
to driving innovation and creating impactful change
. With a unique blend of creativity, experience, and passion, we
transform ideas into market-leading startups
. At Kova Builder, we turn bold concepts into reality and lead the way toward the next generation of digital businesses
Our history

A completely new project is born: Flash Now, the leading independent media platform 🚀✨
So... What’s next?
Our mission
At Kova Builder, our mission is to create the next generation of tech-driven startups that transform industries and solve real-world challenges.
We focus on identifying market inefficiencies and turning them into scalable, innovative, and profitable businesses. Our goal is to drive long-term, sustainable impact by using cutting-edge technology and data-driven strategies to disrupt markets and redefine industries.
Our vision
To be the world’s leading Venture Builder, building and scaling high-performance digital startups that lead the way in innovation and disruption.
We aim to redefine industries by creating businesses that aren’t just profitable, but that set new standards for what’s possible, delivering lasting value and making a real difference in the world. Our vision is to empower companies that challenge the status quo and build a future of continuous growth and transformation.
Our values
The Kova culture is defined by ethical and professional principles that constitute our philosophy and define the way we work.
Transparency
We prioritize transparency, communicating openly and accurately to foster trust and ensure clarity in everything we do.
Collaboration
We foster teamwork and collaboration, uniting diverse skills to create a dynamic, innovative, and productive work environment.
Integrity
We uphold honesty, reliability, and ethics, ensuring consistency in our actions and building lasting trust with our people.
Innovation
We constantly seek cutting-edge technology to meet market demands, staying ahead of trends and innovating.
Improvement
We focus on continuous improvement, optimizing products, services, and processes to enhance quality, performance.
Commitment
We are committed to our goals, tackling challenges with focus, perseverance, and determination to exceed expectations.

SOMOS OCA GLOBAL
Un grupo internacional dedicado a las actividades de inspección, ensayos, consultoría, formación y certificación de empresas.
En el Grupo OCA Global disponemos de distintas empresas acreditadas como laboratorio y organismo de inspección y certificación ISO 17029, 17020, 17025 y 17021, para múltiples estándares, siendo reconocidos internacionalmente por ILAC. Ofrecemos un amplio rango de servicios para todo tipo de industrias, sectores y empresas.
Ofrecemos una amplia gama de servicios diseñados para ayudar a nuestros clientes a aumentar la eficiencia de sus procesos, proyectos y productos, así como a reducir el riesgo, controlar la calidad, verificar la cantidad y cumplir con los requisitos reglamentarios pertinentes.

Because our mission is to give every company, no matter the size, the opportunity to innovate and help build a better future.
Learn how we do this
Work with us
How do we do it?
End-to-End solutions
Everything you need to launch new digital products and services. Software development, UX/UI, Product Management, Devops, QA, etc.
Highly engaged talent
Our team becomes part of yours. We are committed to being an integral part of your success and to making things right.
Just one screen away
We are a near-shore firm that works in your time-zone, speaks your language and uses your communication channels to make collaboration fast, simple and convenient.
Tailored to your needs
We adapt to your workflow and preferred collaboration tools and can contribute with our experience in Agile methodologies, when needed.
Check out what we’ve built for our clients
Our mission
To give every company the opportunity to innovate by identifying, training and retaining the best tech & digital talent in developing countries, then deploy them with precision in ways that exceeds our client’s expectations
Our services
End-To-End Innovation Enablers, helping your company unlock it’s full innovation potential.
Dedicated Tech
(full/partial) Squads
We create multi-disciplinary, remote (near-shore) Tech Squads that become part of your team and are trained on Agile methodologies to deliver continuous value. Well-trained remote teams bring clients the opportunity to increase innovation output by accessing a greater / more diverse pool of talent, while reducing the cost of development
On-Demand Software
Development
At our core, we are software developers excited about building digital products and solutions using the latest technologies and agile methodologies. We provide end-to-end capabilities to deliver on your technical requests. Product Management, Tech Architecture, Front / Back End Development,  DevOps & QA
Oowlish
Ventures
We partner with entrepreneurs and organizations to invest and build from scratch new businesses. We co-design a desired Minimum Lovable Product to find product market fit and scale in a lean way. As startup founders ourselves, we love getting things from 0 to 1.
Why Oowlish
A unique culture and a great place to work
We are extremely passionate about cultivating a culture that embraces personal and professional growth, collaboration and diversity. Our team proudly considers Oowlish a Great Place to Work ®️.
We Thrive on Building New Digital Products
At Oowlish, nothing excites us more than transforming a spark of an idea into a fully scalable, successful product. We're experts at taking projects from 0 to 1, and we immerse ourselves in every stage—from ideation to design, validation, and execution.
Experience with companies of all sizes
We’ve been successful startup entrepreneurs and executives and now we work with companies of all sizes, from Fortune 1000 corporations to idea-stage startups.
Boutique / Hands on approach
We develop a tight relationship with our clients, becoming familiar with their businesses to proactively search for growth opportunities to present them.
Tech Stack
we love
We have experience with many technologies and programming languages but have special predilection for a few of them that make innovation easier.
Amazon Web Services
AWS offers a wide range of secure, enterprise-grade, high resilience and high availability solutions. We take advantage of their global data centers and multi-zone redundancy, best uptime protection and risk mitigation to deliver secure, scalable digital experiences.
React.js Web and Native
React is the core of our frontend apps not only because it is the leading web client framework today but also for its presence in contexts outside of web apps, as well as the fact that it's a mature and battle-tested library.
Python
Due to its simple syntax, widespread adoption and high flexibility, Python might be today's most productive language to work with. Generally speaking, it is our language of choice for developing the backend of applications, enabling us to quickly adapt to ever changing business environments for our clients.
Node.js
Node. js is primarily used for non-blocking, event-driven servers, due to its single-threaded nature. It's used for traditional web sites and back-end API services, but was designed with real-time, push-based architectures in mind.
.NET
.NET is an open-source platform for building desktop, web, and mobile applications that can run natively on any operating system. The .NET system includes tools, libraries, and languages that support modern, scalable, and high-performance software development. An active developer community maintains and supports the .NET platform.
Shopify
Shopify is a complete commerce platform that lets you start, grow, and manage a business. It also lets you create and customize an online store, as well as sell in multiple places, including web, mobile, social media, online marketplaces, brick-and-mortar locations, and pop-up shops.
WordPress
WordPress is our choice when it comes to Content Management Systems, not only because it is the most popular CMS in the world but also due to its flexibility, interoperability, multilingual environment and user-friendly ecosystem as well as extensibility in innumerable ways.
Experts in Pets
While we work with companies of all industries, we have a special predilection for pets. In fact, many of our clients are leading companies and innovative startups in the pet industry. We leverage our extensive experience in this industry to build scalable software products and solutions tailored to their unique needs, helping them innovate and grow in a competitive market
Some of the pet companies we've worked with:
Check some of our business cases here:
Oowlish Ventures
In 2022 we created Oowlish Ventures to incubate new business opportunities as well as to invest in pre-seed startups led by visionary entrepreneurs. Beyond providing financial support, we actively contribute to defining and developing their product and technology, ensuring these startups have the tools and expertise needed to succeed
Check out our portfolio
About us / Our Journey
Oowlish was created by Fernando and David, two tech entrepreneurs that had been working together for more than 10 years building successful companies, with the goal of helping other companies and aspiring entrepreneur, innovate better, faster and at greater scale by reducing entry barriers to software development
Our path
Before starting Oowlish they started PetCoach, a pet-tech company that allowed pet owners to have online consultations with veterinarians. This company was backed by top VCs like Comcast Ventures and Maveron. It also had support from the startup accelerator Dreamit Ventures. It was finally acquired by Petco in 2017.
Our family
Founded in 2018, Oowlish has grown into a company with over 100 amazing partners who consider us a Great Place to Work. Our main office is in Fortaleza, Brazil, but we take pride in our diverse mix of cultures, with talent from more than 15 countries working remotely across Latin America.
We are ready,
are you?

Circet Corporate International
Company
Overview
Overview
A World Leading Telecom Network Service Provider
We are Circet, a world major player of the fast-growing global telecommunications industry which is fueled by massive investment in fixed and mobile high-speed connectivity. We are a pioneer in providing turnkey solutions and our extensive portfolio of tailored services ranges from engineering to network rollout, installation, and maintenance - across all technologies.
With operations in 12 countries in Europe, North Africa and America, our company serves leading telecom service providers and manufacturers, tower companies, governments and local players working towards bridging the rural digital divide, private and government-owned large companies, as well as smart cities that own network infrastructures.
Since its creation, Circet has been gaining momentum building on its strong expertise and a key focus on customer satisfaction. A trusted partner for telecommunications projects, our company has demonstrated very solid organic and external growth and has merged forces with many market-leading businesses over the years. And with new equity financing partner Intermediate Capital Group (ICG) on board since October 2021, Circet has set the stage for greater expansion.
OWNERSHIP
The shareholders of Circet include the founders of the company, the leadership team members, managers, and Intermediate Capital Group, the shareholder which finalized the acquisition of Circet in October 2021.
Founders, Leadership team and managers: 50 %
Intermediate Capital Group (ICG): 50 %
MESSAGE FROM OUR CEO
We are building the success of our company by leveraging our experience, our expertise and a strong customer-satisfaction strategy. Our company values make us the trusted partner for telecommunications projects.
Today, we are facing the challenge of rolling out super-fast broadband both on mobile networks with 4G and 5G, and on fixed networks with optical fiber to the home (FTTH).
A long-time partner of service providers, governments and major private players, Circet is ideally positioned to play a pivotal role in the telecommunications projects of tomorrow.
Philippe Lamazou - Chief Executive Officer, Circet
